name: control mapping: satisfied_by entries must be one of {rubric_rule, hook, artifact} per §2.9 enum
command:
printf "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [made-up-thing]
  legal_review_status: pending
" > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-controls-yaml.sh" "$PWD/controls.yaml"
